script.output: GetRequest: HTTP/1.1 200 OK Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN Feature-Policy: payment 'self' X-Recruiting: /#/jobs Accept-Ranges: bytes Cache-Control: public, max-age=0 Last-Modified: Wed, 04 Mar 2026 01:39:51 GMT ETag: W/"1252f-19cb6805ba0" Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8 Content-Length: 75055 Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Wed, 04 Mar 2026 03:19:06 GMT Connection: close <!-- Copyright (c) 2014-2026 Bjoern Kimminich & the OWASP Juice Shop contributors.
